member.name: T:Universe.Attributes.PartitionKeyAttribute
member.summary: Attribute to specify the partition key for a Cosmos DB entity.

member.name: P:Universe.Attributes.PartitionKeyAttribute.Sequence
member.summary: Gets the partition key sequence number.

member.name: P:Universe.Attributes.PartitionKeyAttribute.KeyName
member.summary: Gets the name of the partition key.

member.name: M:Universe.Attributes.PartitionKeyAttribute.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified partition key.

member.name: M:Universe.Attributes.PartitionKeyAttribute.#ctor(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified partition key.
member.param: The partition key sequence number (1-3).
The name of the partition key.

member.param: The name of the column to aggregate.
The aggregate function to apply to the column.

member.summary: The name of the column to aggregate.

member.name: P:Universe.Builder.Options.AggregationOption.Aggregate
member.summary: The aggregate function to apply to the column.

member.name: T:Universe.Builder.Options.ColumnOptions
member.param: List of column names to be part of the query
Adds DISTINCT in the generated query
Only select the specified number of top rows
List of aggregates to be applied to the query. If aggregates are specified, the query will be grouped by the columns.

member.param: List of column names to be part of the query
Adds DISTINCT in the generated query
Only select the specified number of top rows
List of aggregates to be applied to the query. If aggregates are specified, the query will be grouped by the columns.

member.summary: List of column names to be part of the query

member.summary: Adds DISTINCT in the generated query

member.name: P:Universe.Builder.Options.ColumnOptions.Top
member.summary: Only select the specified number of top rows

member.name: P:Universe.Builder.Options.ColumnOptions.Aggregates
member.summary: List of aggregates to be applied to the query. If aggregates are specified, the query will be grouped by the columns.

member.name: T:Universe.Builder.Options.Catalyst
member.summary: Create a generic query string from a list of parameters. The first parameter created will be the first parameter in the where clause of the query string.
member.param: Column name
Value for the where clause associated with the Column
Where operator (eg AND / OR)
Boolean expression operator

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Options.Catalyst.#ctor(System.String,System.Object,Universe.Builder.Options.Q.Where,Universe.Builder.Options.Q.Operator)
member.summary: Create a generic query string from a list of parameters. The first parameter created will be the first parameter in the where clause of the query string.
member.param: Column name
Value for the where clause associated with the Column
Where operator (eg AND / OR)
Boolean expression operator

member.summary: Value for the where clause associated with the Column

member.summary: Creates a list of rule violations when creating a CosmosDb query catalyst

member.name: F:Universe.Builder.Options.Q.Limits.MaxItems
member.summary: Maximum number of items to return

member.name: F:Universe.Builder.Options.Q.Limits.MaxRU
member.summary: Maximum number of RU per query

member.name: T:Universe.Builder.Options.Cluster
member.summary: Clusters are group of Catalysts that are joined by a Where operator (eg AND / OR). This will divide the where clause into multiple groups.
member.param: Catalysts under one group / cluster
Where operator (eg AND / OR)

member.name: M:Universe.Builder.Options.Cluster.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IList{Universe.Builder.Options.Catalyst},Universe.Builder.Options.Q.Where)
member.summary: Clusters are group of Catalysts that are joined by a Where operator (eg AND / OR). This will divide the where clause into multiple groups.
member.param: Catalysts under one group / cluster
Where operator (eg AND / OR)
